'''Squa Tront''' was a talented [[Umbaran/Legends|Umbaran]] swindler and smuggler. He and the [[Falleen/Legends|Falleen]] [[Thula]] were employed by the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] agent [[Kaird]]. They both had to infiltrate into the sending system and managed to steal the [[Bota/Legends|Bota]]. Then, they had to encase the product in [[Carbonite/Legends|carbonite]] and sent it to Kaird, in order to be property of the Black Sun. Instead of following the [[Nediji]]'s plan, Squa and Thula betrayed Kaird and filled the carbonite case of explosives. Kaird narrowly escaped death and vowed revenge, but Squa and Thula had flown away.

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Coruscant Nights I: Jedi Twilight]]'' {{Mo}}
